event: Operation Epic Fury: US/Israel strikes begin, Khamenei killed
Iran closes Strait of Hormuz to US/Israel-allied shipping
Hezbollah launches missiles into Israel from Lebanon
Mojtaba Khamenei named new Supreme Leader
Limited Israeli ground invasion of Lebanon begins
Ceasefire collapses; Iran strikes US Gulf bases
US lifts naval blockade on Iran
Strait of Hormuz traffic resumes; Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire
